nasb.text: The Philistines stood on the mountain on one side while Israel stood on the mountain on the other side, with the valley between them.

esv.text: And the Philistines stood on the mountain on the one side, and Israel stood on the mountain on the other side, with a valley between them.

cnv.text: 非利士人站在這邊山上，以色列人站在那邊山上，中間有山谷分隔。

ccb.text: 双方的军队在两边的山上对峙，中间隔着山谷。
